resources.string: Ebirikuba biriho %1$.1f°%2$s byagaruka ahansi kuhika aha kikomo kyawe kya %3$.1f°%2$s
Okugyezaho data.txt kuruga aha server yaawe
Warning: Okurabura okutoorana oku aharuguru nikibaasa kusheesha battery yaawe juba kukira obwire bwona
URL ya Custom terikuteebwaho, nari eri busha. Noobaasa kuza omu myanya y\'okwongeraho URL y\'omurembe
Enshobi ekabaho obwo arikugyezaho kugaruza busya okukozesa
Kiremirwe kukora gye aha makuru g\'embeera y\'obwire kuruga aha saava yaawe, namunonga %1$s makuru
Ekika kya f \'%1$s\' tikiine nshonga, reeba fairo yaawe y\'okutebeekanisa kandi ogarukye ogyezeho
URL y\'aha muheru terikutaho, editikes.txt kuhindura
App egi ehindwirwemu kwonka server ei orikugikwatanisa terikugarukaho ahabwa Ingo Plugin ahabwa weeWX. Fields neebaasa kutayoreka gye kuhitsya obu weeWX eragarurwa busya
Okugaruka omu mwanya tikuriho, okugarura busya reero okagaruka okagyezaho
%1$s hati neyenda %2$s data fairo kuruga ahari %3$s server, oine kugaruzaho %4$s kandi okagaruzaho %5$s fairo app egi etakatandikire kukora gye. Nyiga Ok kumanya ebirikukiraho ahari %6$s
Okugaruza busya omu ngaro, swipe refix reck to
Ebirikuba biriho %1$.1f°%2$s byeyongyeire kuhika aha kikomo kyawe kya %3$.1f°%2$s
Ebimanyiso nibyetengyesa kukumanyisa obutagatsi, enjura nari omubaro gw\'enjura gwahika aha bugarukiro obu oteireho
Ahabw\'okugira ngu okayanga orusa rw\'okumanyisibwa emirundi ebiri, nooyetenga kukiikiriza omu ntebeekanisa omu mwanya gw\'ekyo, okutandikaho ntebeekanisa?
Nyabura we rinda obwo turikuhamya URL ei waahayo

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Hariho enshobi %1$d ezashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho
Hariho enshobi %1$d ezashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho
Hariho enshobi %1$d eyashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho
Hariho enshobi %1$d ezashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho
Hariho enshobi %1$d ezashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho
Hariho enshobi %1$d ezashangirwe omu fairo ya %2$s, reeba fairo ya %2$s eyashangirwe ahari %3$s nari reeba ebihandiiko bya %4$s ahabw\'ebirikukiraho

resources.string: Radar type \'%1$s\' teriho, reeba fairo yaawe y\'okutebeekanisa kandi ogyezeho
URL ya Radar terikuteebwaho. Noobaasa kuza omu ntebeekanisa kuhindura
Nitumanyisa buri izooba enjura yahika aha kikomo eki oteireho
Enjura ya %1$.2fin omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Severe\'
Enjura ya %1$.2fin omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Okurabura\'
Enjura ya %1$.2fin omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Reeba\'
Enjura ya %1$.1fmm omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Severe\'
Enjura ya %1$.1fmm omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Okurabura\'
Enjura ya %1$.1fmm omu %2$d %3$s ezihwaire ehikire aha rurengo rwa \'Reeba\'
Okurabura enjura yaaba neerenga aha kikomo ky\'amaani kurugirira aha bwire bw\'enjura
Okurabura enjura yaaba neerenga aha kikomo ky\'okurabura kurugiirira aha bwire bw\'enjura
Okurabura enjura yaaba neerenga aha kipimo ky\'okureeba kurugiirira aha bwire bw\'enjura
Noohamya ngu nooyenda kwihaho data yoona?
Okurabura okuhitsya emirundi ebiri buri izooba obutagatsi bwahika aha bugarukiro obu oteireho
Teekaho ebihandiiko by\'emikono, kwonka tihaine ebiri omu nkora hati
URL ekateebwa aha nshonga nari erimu busha
Tikabaasa kukwatanisa nari okutunga kuruga omu URL y\'omugyenzo erikworekwa
Tikibaasize kukwatira nari okutunga %1$s kuruga ahari %2$s
Tikabaasa kukwatanisa nari okutunga ekishushani kya radar= kuruga aha intaneeti
Tikabaasa kukwatanisa nari okutunga ebitebeekanisiibwe kuruga ahari server yaawe
Tikabaasa kukwatanisa nari okutunga ekishushani kya weebu kuruga aha server yaawe
Tibarabaasize kutunga %1$s ahabwokuba URL ekaba eri busha
URL ya Webcam teteirweho ninga eri busha
Nikibaasa kuba kyagarukiremu kwonka WiFi okutaaha
